scope: Port PDF @mention attachment handling into AgenC's prompt attachment and provider wire layers

rows.source: PDF extension detection, raw-byte validation, and @mention PDF reference anchors
requiredBehaviors: recognize .pdf @mentions separately from text file mentions
reject empty, invalid-magic, oversize, unreadable, and outside-root PDF paths
encode accepted PDFs as base64 application/pdf attachment records
carry best-effort extracted text for providers that cannot consume local PDF bytes natively
leave PDFs out of text file expansion so binary payloads are not read as UTF-8
edgeCases: submit-path prompt that already contains attached file context
per-file and total PDF byte caps

rows.source: Attachment-to-message rendering and supplemental document content anchors
requiredBehaviors: render PDF mentions as user-context messages
include a model-visible attached_pdfs text header with path, media type, and byte count
append PDF document parts after the text header
deliver PDF document parts through direct Session.runTurn callers
edgeCases: PDF and image attachments emitted in one turn
runtime transcript display degrades document parts to a stable marker

rows.source: Provider native PDF document block anchors
requiredBehaviors: preserve PDF document parts in the runtime LLM content type
serialize PDFs as Anthropic document blocks
serialize PDFs as OpenAI Responses input_file parts
send extracted PDF text through chat-completions/OpenAI-compatible paths
send extracted PDF text through xAI Responses for local PDFs while preserving file_url/file_id input_file references
edgeCases: tool result content containing unsupported document parts
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/wire/messages-anthropic.test.ts src/llm/wire/chat-completions.test.ts src/llm/wire/responses-openai.test.ts src/llm/wire/responses-xai.test.ts

rows.source: Message normalization, compaction, and rollout preservation anchors
requiredBehaviors: clone PDF document parts without mutating nested source payloads
convert PDF document parts through the AgenC runtime message adapter
restore PDF document parts after context preparation or compaction
avoid treating document payloads as images in transcript metadata
edgeCases: document payloads do not inflate text-only request metrics with base64 bodies
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/session/run-turn.test.ts src/llm/wire/messages-anthropic.test.ts src/llm/wire/responses-openai.test.ts
